creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
Hi,

I've sent a mail to mich@ to ask him if he could take a look at this patch.

Maybe we could add a small chapter in the porter's Handbook 'Dos and Don'ts' to
warn porters about this situation and advise them to add --without- and
--disable- options whenever possible ?

Best regards,

Ganaël LAPLANCHE
ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
